task.title: Improve KRN doctor activation readiness
task.objective: Use activation smoke, search candidates, anti-memory, and explicit exclusions.

memoryRecords.summary: Activation smoke must prove explicit exclusions
memoryRecords.body: M25 activation readiness depends on bounded context, anti-memory blocking, and persisted decisions.
memoryRecords.applicationGuidance: Use when implementing activation smoke and doctor readiness.

memoryRecords.body: Old dashboard planning note that should not enter activation context.
memoryRecords.applicationGuidance: Do not use for activation engine implementation.

sourceClaims.claim: Activation smoke should prove bounded context and explicit exclusions.
sourceClaims.mechanism: A noisy fixture forces the engine to include only high-signal context and record exclusions.
sourceClaims.krnImplication: M25 should add an activation smoke path before doctor readiness can be claimed.
sourceClaims.doesNotProve: This does not prove production ranking quality.

sourceClaims.claim: Activation readiness should add a source crawler.
sourceClaims.mechanism: A crawler would gather more source material.
sourceClaims.doesNotProve: The crawler is within M25 scope.

sourceClaims.claim: Activation can rely on broad context because more is safer.
sourceClaims.krnImplication: This would encourage broad context dumping.
sourceClaims.doesNotProve: The claim has a working mechanism.

searchDocuments.title: Activation smoke search document
searchDocuments.body: Activation readiness uses search candidates, explicit exclusions, and anti-memory conflict handling.
searchDocuments.searchText: activation readiness search candidates explicit exclusions anti-memory conflict

antiMemoryRecords.rejectedClaim: Activation readiness should add a source crawler.
antiMemoryRecords.reason: Source crawler is out of scope for M25.
antiMemoryRecords.summary: Do not add crawler for M25 activation
antiMemoryRecords.body: Use existing source, memory, and search substrate before adding crawler scope.
